title: $1,000 on the Black
writer: Ernesto Gastaldi, Vittorio Salerno, Rolf Olsen
actors: Anthony Steffen, Gianni Garko, Erika Blanc
plot: Twelve years ago, Sartana framed his brother Johnny for murder and stole his girlfriend. Now the town's undisputed boss and doted over by his possessive mother, Sartana seems safe - until, his sentence served, Johnny rides back in...
